hooks.command: input=$(cat); file=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // .tool_response.filePath // empty'); if echo "$file" | grep -q 'rpipe\.go$'; then version=$(grep 'const VERSION' "$file" 2>/dev/null | grep -oP '"[^"]+"'); if [ -n "$version" ]; then echo "{\"systemMessage\": \"VERSION changed to $version — remember to update README.md and README.ko.md if not already done.\"}"; fi; fi
